title: Pedro Sánchez becomes prime minister of Spain
fact: Pedro Sánchez Pérez-Castejón is a Spanish politician and economist who has served as Prime Minister of Spain since 2018.

title: Adolfo Suárez becomes prime minister of Spain
fact: Adolfo Suárez González, 1st Duke of Suárez was a Spanish lawyer and politician.

title: Mariano Rajoy becomes prime minister of Spain
fact: Mariano Rajoy Brey is a Spanish politician who served as Prime Minister of Spain from 2011 to 2018.

title: José Luis Rodríguez Zapatero becomes prime minister of Spain
fact: José Luis Rodríguez Zapatero is a Spanish politician and member of the Spanish Socialist Workers' Party (PSOE).

title: José María Aznar becomes prime minister of Spain
fact: José María Aznar López is a Spanish politician who was the prime minister of Spain from 1996 to 2004.

title: Luis Carrero Blanco becomes prime minister of Spain
fact: Admiral-General Luis Carrero Blanco was a Spanish Navy officer and politician.

title: Felipe González becomes prime minister of Spain
fact: Felipe González Márquez is a retired Spanish politician who was Prime Minister of Spain from 1982 to 1996 and leader of the Spanish Socialist Workers' Party from 1974 to 1997.

title: Carlos Arias Navarro becomes prime minister of Spain
fact: Carlos Arias Navarro, 1st Marquess of Arias Navarro, was the Prime Minister of Spain during the final years of the Francoist dictatorship and the beginning of the Spanish transition to democracy.

title: Leopoldo Calvo-Sotelo becomes prime minister of Spain
fact: Leopoldo Ramón Pedro Calvo-Sotelo y Bustelo, 1st Marquess of Ría de Ribadeo, was a Spanish civil engineer and politician.

title: Torcuato Fernández-Miranda becomes prime minister of Spain
fact: Torcuato Fernández-Miranda y Hevia, 1st Duke of Fernández-Miranda was a Spanish lawyer and politician who played important roles in both the Spanish State of Francisco Franco and in the Spanish transition to democracy.
